title: Dungeons and Taverns Jungle Temple Overhaul
description: Overhauls Jungle Temples with 4 Variants using new loot tables alongside the Vanilla Loot Table and can have archeology elements inside as well as new puzzles
body:
This mod is part of the [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-and-taverns) series, but **does not require** Dungeons and Taverns to work. The main Dungeons and Taverns mod **does NOT include** this mod's features. If you would like more structures similar to this one, then check [my profile!](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nova_wostra/projects)

- Overhauls the Jungle Temple with 4 variations of the Jungle Temple
- 4 Bogged Prespawn here
- New loot tables alongside the vanilla one
- Archeology system is used in 2 of the 4 variants of the Jungle Temple
